name: gtray
description: Minimal macOS Gmail wrapper: all your inboxes, the web experience intact
author: Matías Sánchez Cabrera

extendInfo.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: GTray uses Bluetooth for security keys when signing in to Google.
extendInfo.NSCameraUsageDescription: GTray needs camera access for Google Meet video calls.
extendInfo.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: GTray needs microphone access for Google Meet calls.
